entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop naturally infected by SRSV-Ind

entities.name: SUGARCANE
entities.description: A crop grown near sorghum in Maharashtra, India, and source of SRSV-Ind isolate Co740

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where the potyvirus was found

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted and the virus was isolated

entities.name: SORGHUM RED STRIPE POTYVIRUS (SRSV-IND)
entities.description: A potyvirus belonging to the sugarcane mosaic virus subgroup that causes systemic necrotic red stripe symptoms in sorghum

entities.name: SUGARCANE MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: A virus subgroup to which SRSV-Ind belongs

entities.name: SYSTEMIC NECROTIC RED STRIPE SYMPTOMS
entities.description: Symptoms characterized by necrotic red stripes induced by SRSV-Ind

entities.name: MILD MOSAIC
entities.description: A disease reaction with a disease severity reaction (DSR) score of 2

entities.name: SEVERE MOSAIC
entities.description: A disease reaction with a disease severity reaction (DSR) score of 3

entities.name: INFECTIVITY LEVELS
entities.description: A measure of the ability of the virus to infect the host

entities.name: DISEASE SEVERITY REACTIONS
entities.description: A measure of the severity of the disease symptoms, denoted as DSR

entities.name: VIRUS TITRES
entities.description: The concentration of virus particles in the infected host

entities.name: MECHANICAL INOCULATION
entities.description: A method of introducing the virus into the plant tissue

entities.name: MAIZE DWARF MOSAIC VIRUS-B
entities.description: A virus distinct from SRSV-Ind in its infection pattern across sorghum differentials
